compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Context

rebar's three LLM review gates — plan-review, code-review, and completion-verification — each
produce a rich internal record, but only a fraction is durably captured today:

- Plan-review and code-review run a shared four-pass kernel (find → verify → decide → coach) and
  emit a reducer-ignored `REVIEW_RESULT` sidecar. The plan-review sidecar drops the pass-1
  `evidence` and `scenarios` fields; the code-review sidecar persists only the *surfaced* findings
  (blocking + advisory + coaching) and omits the dropped / indeterminate / overflow buckets. Neither
  persists the numeric `block_threshold` a finding was judged against — it is resolved from the
  criteria registry at decision time and then discarded.
- Completion-verification is single-pass and emits a sidecar ONLY on FAIL; a PASS persists just
  signed counts, so a successful close leaves no per-criterion audit record.
- All review sidecars are pruned to the most recent 10 per ticket.

A downstream feature (the ticket audit-trail UI, a separate follow-on epic) needs a COMPLETE,
self-contained audit record. This epic makes the stored audit data lossless and readable; it builds
NO UI. The read layer it ships also makes the audit data scriptable via CLI/MCP — valuable on its own.

## Approach rationale

Enrich the existing observability sidecars in place (new schema versions) rather than introduce a
new persistence mechanism — the sidecar path is already the durable, reducer-ignored, retained
record every review writes, so extending its payload is the lowest-blast-radius way to capture the
missing data. The signed attestation manifest is deliberately left carrying counts only (its
integrity contract is out of scope); this epic enriches observability, not the signature.

## Success Criteria

- Every new plan-review and code-review `REVIEW_RESULT` sidecar captures the full four-pass record:
  the complete pass-1 finding list (including previously-dropped fields), the full pass-2
  verification, the pass-3 determination WITH the resolved numeric threshold, and pass-4 coaching —
  across ALL buckets, not just surfaced ones.
- A completion-verification PASS persists a per-criterion audit record (not only counts).
- Review-sidecar retention is raised so a ticket's review history is deep enough to audit.
- A documented read API (library + CLI + MCP) returns the full retained audit history for a ticket
  and resolves a ticket's associated code reviews via the existing `relates_to` links.

## Scope

- IN: sidecar payload enrichment (plan + code), completion PASS-path capture + agent
  output-contract change, retention-cap change, the audit read layer.
- OUT: any web UI or rendering (the follow-on epic); asymmetric-key signing; changing what is
  SIGNED (attestations still carry counts only).

## Compatibility & rollback

Sidecar schemas are bumped (`plan_review_result_v2` / `code_review_result_v2` / a completion `_v2`);
readers accept BOTH the old `v1` (rendered with the new fields absent) and the new `v2` records, so
pre-existing reviews stay readable and no backfill is required. Each change is inert until it next
runs; reverting a story restores the prior payload shape with no migration.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] All five child stories are closed.
- [ ] After this epic, a freshly-run plan-review and code-review each write a `*_v2` sidecar whose
      payload contains every pass-1 finding across all buckets with its pass-2 verification, its
      pass-3 validity/impact/priority/decision/reason, the resolved numeric `block_threshold`, and
      the pass-4 coaching. Oracle: an integration test runs a review and asserts on the emitted event
      JSON.
- [ ] A completion-verification PASS emits a per-criterion audit record. Oracle: a test asserting on
      the emitted completion event.
- [ ] The audit read layer returns the full retained history for a ticket and its `relates_to`-linked
      code reviews. Oracle: an integration test seeding a ticket's histories and asserting the
      aggregate contains all of them.
compiled_state.title: Audit data enrichment — lossless capture of review passes
